verses.text: “Amaute in keima tungah siampi na a sep theihna dingun amaute na sian'thosakna dingin amaute' tungah na hih ding thute: Bawngtalno khat leh a sitbaanglo tuutal nih
leh silngo sawhloh anlum, sathau a kihel silngo sawhloh mohte, sathau tawh a kizut silngo sawhloh mohphengte la in. Tuate pen mangbuhnel tawh na bawl ding hi
Lawh khat sungah tuate koihin tuate a lawhin paipihin, a bawngtal leh a tuutal nih zong na paipih ding hi
“Kikhopna buk kongkhakah Aaron leh a tapate na paipih ding a, tui tawh amaute na sil ding hi
Nangmah in puante la-in, puantungsilh leh siampi puantualpi, siampipuan leh awmdal, Aaron silhsakin, hoihtakin a kigan siampipuan gakna tawh amah na gak ding hi
Ama lu tungah dialpi khim sakin, dialpi tungah kumpi lukhu siangtho na khusak ding hi
Nangmah in nilh sathau la-in, ama lu tungah sungin amah na nilh ding hi
“Tua ciangin nangmah in ama tapate paipihin, amaute, puantungsilh na silhsak ding a
kawnggakte tawh amaute gakin, amau' lu tungah a lukhute uh na gak ding hi. Siampi nasepna pen a kip tawntung ngeina ahih manin amau-a' hi ding hi. Tua bangin Aaron leh a tapate na kipsak ding hi
“Tua ciangin kikhopna buk mai-ah bawngtal na paipih ding hi. Aaron leh a tapate in bawngtal lu tungah amau' khut nga ding uh a
Topa' mai, kikhopna buk kongkhakah nangmah in a bawngtal na go ding hi
Bawngtal sisan tawmkhat la-in na khutme tawh biakna tau kite na nuh ding a, si a omlai teng biakna tau bulah na sungkhia ding hi
A gilpi tuam a thau khempeuh leh a sin tunga a utok leh a kal nihte leh a kal tuam a thau na la ding a, biakna tau tungah tuate na hal ding hi
Ahih hangin bawngtal sa leh a vun leh a ekte, giahphual pua lamah mei tawh na hal ding hi. Tua pen khialhna hanga biakna ahi hi
“Tua ciangin nangmah in tuutalte khat la-in, Aaron leh a tapate in tuutal lu tungah amau' khut nga ding uh a
nangmah in tuutal go-in, a si la-in biakna tau kimkotah na theh ding hi
Tua ciangin tuutal semnen-in, a sungkua leh a khete silin, a sabakte leh a lu tawh tuate koihin
biakna tau tungah tuutal a bupin na hal ding hi. Tua pen Topa' tungah meihal biakna hi a, a gim namtui, Topa' tungah mei tawh kihal biakna ahi hi
“Nangmah in tuutal adang khat na la ding hi. Aaron leh a tapate in tua tuutal lu tungah amau' khut nga ding uh a

nangmah in tuutal go-in, a si tawmkhat la-in Aaron' taklam bil dawn leh ama tapate' taklam bil dawnte leh amau' taklam khutpi dawnte leh amau' taklam khepi dawnte nuhin, si a omlai teng biakna tau kiimah na theh ding hi

Tua ciangin biakna tau tunga a om si tawmkhat leh nilh sathau la-in Aaron leh ama puante tung leh a tapate leh a puante tungah na theh ding hi. Tua ciangin amah leh a puante leh a tapate leh a puante a siangtho hi ding hi
“Nangmah in tuutal thau, a mei, a gilpi tuam a thau, a sin pan a utok, a kal nihte, a kal tuam a thau, leh a taklam phei (bang hang hiam cih leh tuate pen kipsakna tuutal ahi hi
leh Topa' mai-ah a om silngo sawhloh anlum lawh sung panin anlum khat, sathau tawh a kibawl anlum bek khat, leh moh pheng khat na la ding hi
Hihte khempeuh Aaron' khutsung leh a tapate' khutsungah na koih ding a, Topa' mai-ah vei-a piak dingin na vei ding hi
Tua ciangin amau' khutsung panin tuate na la ding a, Topa' mai-ah a gim namtui dingin biakna tau tungah mei tawh kihal biakna banah na hal ding hi. Tua pen Topa' tungah mei tawh kihal biakna ahi hi
“Nangmah in Aaron a kikipsakna tuutal sa-iik la-in Topa' mai-ah vei-a piak dingin na vei ding hi. Tua pen nangma tanh hi ding hi
“Kipsakna sa pen Aaron leh ama tapate-a' ding ahih ciangin, kipsakna tuutal panin a kipia, a kivei siampite' tanh a phei leh vei-a piak sa-iikte na siangthosak ding hi

Tua pen Aaron leh ama tapate-a' dingin Israel mite' tung panin a kaih tawntung ding uh ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh thunuama amau' biakna panin Israel mite in a piak ding siampite' tanh ahi hi. Tua pen Topa' tungah amau' piak ahi hi
“Aaron' biakna puan siangthote pen ama sih khit ciangin a tapate' tungah kipia ding a, amaute sathau kinilhin a kikipsakna ding ahi hi
Ama za luahin siampi na a sem a tapa in siangtho munah nasem dingin kikhopna bukah a pai ciangin ni sagih sung tuate silh ding hi
“Nangmah in kipsakna tuutal la-in a siangtho biakna mun khatah a sa na huan ding hi
Aaron leh a tapate in kikhopna buk kongkhakah tuutal sa leh lawh sunga om anlum ne ding uh hi

Amaute in amaute a kikipsakna ding leh a siangthosak dingin kilemna a kibawlna tua ante ne ding uh a, ahih hangin a pualam mi in tuate ne theilo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate pen a siangtho biakna an ahi hi
Kipsakna sate khat peuhpeuh ahi a, anlum ahi zongin, zingsang ciangdong a omlai leh nangmah in a omlaite mei tawh na hal ding hi. Tuate pen biakna an siangtho ahih manin kinelo ding hi
“Tua bangin nang kong thupiakte khempeuh tawh kituakin Aaron leh ama tapate' tungah na hih ding a, ni sagih sung tawntung amaute ki-apna na bawl ding hi

Kilemna dingin mawhna hanga biakna-in ni simin bawngtal khat na pia ding hi. Siangtho sakna dingin sathau na nilh ciang leh kilemna na bawl ciangin biakna tau-a' dingin khialhna hanga biakna khat zong na pia ding hi
Biakna tau-a' dingin ni sagih sung kilemna bawlin na siangthosak ding hi. Tua ciangin biakna tau a siangtho pen suak ding a, tua biakna tau a lawng peuhpeuh a siangtho suak ding hi.
“Tu-in biakna tau tungah na piak tawntung dingte hih bang ahi hi: Nisimin a kizomin kum khat a pha tuuno nihta hi ding hi
Tuuno khat zingsang lamin na pia ding a, adang tuuno khat nitak lamin na pia ding hi
Tuuno a masa tawh annel lawh khat leh a oliv thau hai khat tawh a kihel leh tuibuah dingin leenggahzu hai khat hi ding hi
Tuuno adang khat nitakin na pia ding a, zingsanga mah bangin a gim namtui ding, Topa' mai-ah mei tawh kihal biakna-in an tawh biakna leh tuibuah tawh na pia khawm ding hi
Nang tunga thu kong genna ding, nang tawh ka kituahna ding mun, Topa' mai kikhopna buk kongkhakah na khang tawntungun a kipia tawntung ding meihal biakna hi ding hi
Tua lai-ah Israel mite tawh ka kituah ding a, keima vang in tua mun siangthosak ding hi
Keimah in kikhopna buk leh biakna tau ka siangthosak ding a, keima siampi na a sem dingin Aaron leh a tapate zong ka siangthosak ding hi
Israel mite lakah keimah tengin amau' Pasian ka hi ding hi
Amaute' lakah keimah ka ten'na hangin Egypt leitang panin amaute a paikhiatpih Topa amau' Pasian ka hihna amaute in hong thei ding uh hi. Kei pen Topa amau' Pasian ka hi hi.
